title: REPLACE causes segfault in table with generated column and foreign key
poc: CREATE TABLE t0 (c0, c1 a UNIQUE AS (1), c2, c3, FOREIGN KEY(c3) REFERENCES t0(c1));
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE vt0 USING fts4(c0);
CREATE INDEX i0 ON t0(0) WHERE 0;
REPLACE INTO t0(c3, c2, c0) VALUES (0, 0, 0), (0, 0, 0);
key_bug_features: REPLACE with foreign key and generated column causes segfault
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, age INTEGER, score REAL, FOREIGN KEY(score) REFERENCES t1(age));
CREATE TABLE t2 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value INTEGER, generated_value INTEGER GENERATED ALWAYS AS (value * 2) STORED);
INSERT INTO t1 (name, age, score) VALUES ('Alice', 30, 90.5), ('Bob', 25, 85.0);
REPLACE INTO t1 (id, name, age, score) VALUES (1, 'Charlie', NULL, 95.0), (2, 'David', 28, NULL);
